headline: In 2036, Investors Will Regret Not Loading Up on This Multibagger in the Making
summary: Regeneron's science and its Dupixent revenue are paving the way for it to further expand its portfolio.

headline: A Look At Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Valuation After Positive Obesity Phase 3 Trial Results
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) has drawn fresh attention after reporting strong Phase 3 results for olatorepatide, a dual GLP-1/GIP obesity treatment, with significant weight loss outcomes and plans to start a global Phase 3 program. See our latest analysis for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals. At a share price of US$774.66, Regeneron has seen a 3.73% 90 day share price return and a 12.96% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum is building as investors weigh the olatorepatide data,...
